sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data (empid INTEGER, dept TEXT, Q1_sales INTEGER, Q2_sales INTEGER, Q3_sales INTEGER, Q4_sales INTEGER);
WITH unpivoted_data AS (UNPIVOT sales FOR quarter IN (Q1_sales, Q2_sales, Q3_sales, Q4_sales)) SELECT * FROM unpivoted_data;
UPDATE sales_data SET Q1_sales = 3000 WHERE empid = 2;
SELECT empid, dept, sales FROM sales_data UNPIVOT (sales FOR quarter IN (Q1_sales, Q2_sales));
